metadata.title: Interactive Power BI Dashboards — Data Visualization
metadata.description: Built interactive Power BI dashboards that transformed raw datasets into clear, actionable visual stories for non-technical stakeholders.

title: Power BI Dashboards
content: Designed and developed a suite of interactive Power BI dashboards for IRD Foundation. Visualized KPIs including website traffic trends, SEO ranking movements, and campaign performance metrics — enabling real-time, self-serve data exploration for decision-makers across teams.
